title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: New Law Enforcement Vehicles and Discounts
content:
Become the star of your squadron behind the wheel of the new Bravado Buffalo Cruiser, the latest high-performance Law Enforcement Vehicle repurposed for civilian use, available via Warstock Cache & Carry.

The Bravado Buffalo STX Pursuit is the alpha of the LSPD’s vehicle fleet, and this apex predator feeds on the hopes of getaway cars and fugitives, available via Warstock Cache & Carry on April 9.
